title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Cash & Carry Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Cash & Carry Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Cash & Carry Capital India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Cash & Carry Capital India:
Metro Cash & Carry Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Cash & Carry Capital India!
